findings.title: Cyclomatic complexity of unchanged helper is high
findings.body: The helper at line 50 has high cyclomatic complexity. It is not in the diff hunk but it is referenced from the new code added in this PR; addressing complexity here would help maintainability.
findings.suggested_fix: Refactor the helper to reduce branching.

overall_explanation: Single maintainability finding outside hunks but in a touched file.
